title: Mikko Hyppönen
html: Stub. Finnish security researcher (Chief Research Officer at F-Secure / WithSecure) and author of If It's Smart, It's Vulnerable. Yahir read the book's AI / Tesla / Wolverines / Ad-monetization chapters on 2025-06-04 (4 page screenshots). Hyppönen frames AI through an info-security lens — Deep Blue → Kasparov, narrow vs general intelligence, F-Secure's 2005 ML automation, and the "switch it off" fallacy.

related.label: Hyppönen — *If It's Smart, It's Vulnerable* AI chapter (Deep Blue / Kasparov / 'unnatural intelligence')
Hyppönen — MIT's $600/mo WhatsApp study, Facebook ARPU math, and why Tesla feels revolutionary
Hyppönen — narrow vs wide AI, F-Secure's 2005 ML lab, and the 'just switch it off' fallacy
